items.name_en: Milk White《Small Size》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C Latest Woven Flap Bag, Handwoven Bag, Handwoven Bag Shopping Bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements are indispensable in a vacation vibe. Made with imported natural wheat straw, it's surprising to see so many bright-colored suede handbags in the summer vacation series... Perfect for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, the bag is sure to be adorned with jewelry. The favorite is of course the collector series ice cream cup~Size: 23cm

items.name_en: OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 25B Black Gold 25 Bag. The 25 bag is incredibly hot, so they followed up with a backpack series! Retaining the 25 bag shape, they added a backpack style! The sides still have double pockets √ The opening has a drawstring adjustment; smooth lines and a structured shape continue the 25 series' practicality. 🤩🤩 Large capacity; the opening has a magnetic snap! Security is maxed out!! I was heart-pounded seeing the real thing 💓. 5600. Size: 23x23x14cm

items.name_en: Two sizes available 🚩🚩🚩 Large H Real photos 🌟🌟🌟 "Export Product" Shipped 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality 🔮🔮🔮 Price is a bit high 😯 Ohanel 25A "Dark Horse" Backpack. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, with a large internal patch pocket. Retro matte gold hardware, large capacity, fits daily items 👍🏻. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, the long shoulder strap is adjustable. Size: 18*24*6cm/5347

items.name_en: Small Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality, price is a bit high 😯 OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 25A Grained Handle Mailer Bag. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, retro matte gold hardware. Capacity fits daily items 👍🏻. Larger than previous flap bags 😌. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, which can be worn as an accessory or on the shoulder. Size: 15.5*22*6cm/5147001180

items.name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️Authentic Packaging as shown
New Arrival🆕Chane1 25B Autumn/Winter
Riveted Mini Messenger Bag Black♥
Purchased from counter for 35600rmb~
Hotly released🔥Chain Mini Flap Bag
When the softness of the quilted pattern meets the toughness of the rivets,
A sense of aesthetic conflict emerges in the black-gold color scheme~
Interior features multiple compartments, card slots, zip coin pouch
Hidden pockets are all present, functionality is off the charts🪄
Hardware: Thick 24k plated vintage bright gold
Leather: Gaiera "Square Logo" Lambskin
Dimensions: 12*19*5 cm

items.name_en: Export Product Milk White! Small Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Affinity Duma Backpack The hottest one is definitely Duma, extremely high popularity🆙, finally returned to the classic 25B series🌟🌟. The classic quilted pattern is on the zipper puller and leather drawstring. The material is still calf leather. The black-gold color scheme is versatile and premium√. The leather is glossy and shiny👅👅, and it is wear-resistant. No need to worry too much when using~ The bag shape is compact and powerful! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! Capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Size: 20X19 x12cm
